metas.description: KALDI ART is a premier global art platform that connects art and audiences through knowledge, artistry, connection, discovery, and innovation.

about.title: ABOUT | KALDI ART
about.bodyText:
KALDI ART
Skip to main content
ADVISORY
PROJECTS
ARTISTS
PRIVATE SALES
SIGNAL
JOURNAL
ABOUT
ABOUT
'Shaping the Future of Contemporary Art'

KALDI ART is a global art advisory operating between Asia and Europe, delivering active market expertise and strategic insight to collectors, galleries, and institutions worldwide.

We specialize in identifying exceptional works and facilitating high-level transactions, providing collectors with discreet, informed guidance and access to emerging and established artists across the international art market.

 

With over two decades of combined advisory experience, KALDI ART navigates the global art landscape with precision, drawing on a deeply trusted network of collectors, galleries, and institutions to connect clients to the opportunities and artworks that define contemporary collecting.

Our work is guided by a strong curatorial perspective, allowing us to recognize potential early and introduce compelling voices to the market with confidence.

 

At KALDI ART, we combine comprehensive market insights, strategic vision, and global reach to ensure collectors engage with the art that shapes today’s cultural landscape.

 

 

KALDI ART

FROM BERLIN & SEOUL TO THE WORLD

CONTACT@KALDIART.COM

 

 

ENQUIRY
Name *
Email *
Phone
Message
Receive newsletters *
 Yes  No
SEND

* denotes required fields

In order to respond to your enquiry, we will process the personal data you have supplied in accordance with our privacy policy (available on request). You can unsubscribe or change your preferences at any time by clicking the link in our emails.

INSTAGRAM

advisory.title: ADVISORY | KALDI ART
advisory.bodyText:
KALDI ART
Skip to main content
ADVISORY
PROJECTS
ARTISTS
PRIVATE SALES
SIGNAL
JOURNAL
ABOUT
ADVISORY

Tailored strategies for collectors, galleries, institutions and brands.
At KALDI ART, we offer bespoke advisory services rooted in deep market insight and a global network. Whether you're building a collection,

seeking strategic exposure, or exploring international expansion, our guidance is always discreet, research-driven, and forward-thinking.

 

WE SUPPORT:

Emerging and established collectors

Galleries/Artists seeking global positioning

Institutions aiming for meaningful acquisitions or cultural impact

Brands exploring cultural collaborations and creative storytelling


STRONG & EXCLUSIVE GLOBAL NEWWORK:

Our extensive global network spans over 15 countries and 30+ cities, encompassing a wide range of trusted partners.

We bring together galleries, institutions, art professionals, collectors, and artists in a collaborative space.
Through multi-layered interactions and partnerships, we create a dynamic and sustainable circulation within the art market.

 

For tailored support and inquiries, contact us at contact@kaldiart.com

COLLECTOR ADVISORY
BESPOKE GUIDANCE FOR INDIVIDUAL AND INSTITUTIONAL COLLECTORS.
We help build meaningful, strategic collections—from emerging talents to blue-chip works. Our service includes market entry planning, acquisition strategy, portfolio diversification, and legacy consulting.
 
GALLERY & ARTIST ADVISORY
STRATEGIC SUPPORT FOR ARTISTS, GALLERIES, AND ESTATES LOOKING TO GROW INTERNATIONALLY.

From positioning and branding to fair participation and partnership building, we provide targeted insights and actionable plans tailored to your career stage or gallery goals.

INSTITUTIONAL & PHILANTHROPIC ADVISORY
CUSTOM STRATEGIES FOR MUSEUMS, FOUNDATIONS, AND PUBLIC INITIATIVES.

We consult on curatorial direction, acquisitions, program development, and philanthropic art giving—ensuring long-term cultural impact through thoughtful planning and trusted networks.

 
BRAND & CULTURAL PARTNERSHIPS
CREATING MEANINGFUL COLLABORATIONS BETWEEN BRANDS AND THE ART WORLD.

We develop and curate culturally impactful projects that connect brands with artists, audiences, and institutions—through immersive events, brand activations, artist commissions, or long-term cultural initiatives. Each project is carefully tailored to align with both brand identity and artistic integrity.

 

Manage cookies
COPYRIGHT © 2026 KALDI ART SITE BY ARTLOGIC

metas.description: The pulse of the fast-moving art market Sharp, curated intelligence, critical market shifts, auction highlights, gallery movements, and institutional shifts. We share only the signals that matter, distilled through KALDI ART's cross-continental lens between Europe and Asia.
